news.summary: The state reported a total of 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 today, along with 20 additional deaths. This brings the total number of cases to 50,000 and the death toll to 700 in the state. Hospitalizations have also risen to 300, with 50 patients in critical condition. The state health department continues to urge the public to follow safety guidelines and take necessary precautions to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: $22B auction to test US long-dated debt viability.

news.summary: Englewood, Colorado – XTI Aerospace, Inc. (Nasdaq: XTIA), a leader in xVTOL and powered-lift aircraft innovations, announced on June 12, 2025, that they have made significant progress in enhancing the aerodynamics design of the TriFan 600 xVTOL aircraft. The company reported successful acceleration in the performance analysis. No specific figures were provided in the statement.
news.headline: XTI collaborates with U.S. DOE's Oak Ridge National Lab to speed up xVTOL aircraft development, using Frontier Supercomputer.

news.summary: In an interview, Paul Tudor Jones highlighted the US's increasing budget deficits and limited fiscal space, suggesting a strategy of a diversified portfolio including Bitcoin, gold, and equities to combat this. He emphasized that a balanced portfolio of these assets could help tackle inflation and volatility, considering Bitcoin's high volatility compared to gold. Jones recommended a mix of stocks, gold, and Bitcoin as the ideal portfolio for this environment. This advice was given against the backdrop of the US's ongoing deficit spending, which Jones believes will necessitate future policymakers to manage this issue carefully. Jones' insights were shared with Bloomberg in a broader discussion on the fiscal outlook of the United States.
news.headline: Billionaire Paul Tudor Jones highlights diversifying with Bitcoin, gold, and stocks as best defense against inflation.

news.summary: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. ("HASI"), a prominent investor in sustainable infrastructure assets, has revealed that its subsidiaries, HAT Holdings I LLC and HAT Holdings II LLC, have initiated a cash tender offer to acquire the outstanding notes specified in the table below. This offer signifies the Company's commitment to investing in sustainable infrastructure ventures. HASI's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol "HASI."
news.headline: HASI offers to buy back up to $500 million of 3.375% Senior Notes Due 2026 and 8.00% Green Senior Unsecured Notes Due 2027.

news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, on June 12, 2025, Clearmind Medicine has partnered with a prominent government and political affairs firm in order to further the development of psychedelic therapeutics. This collaboration aims to accelerate the progress of Clearmind Medicine's innovative treatments in the field.
news.headline: Clearmind Medicine in Vancouver partners with top govt affairs firm to push forward psychedelic therapeutics on June 12, 2025

news.summary: In Billings, Montana on June 12, 2025, Bion Environmental Technologies, Inc. (OTC QB: BNET), a prominent company specializing in advanced treatment of livestock and organic waste along with resource recovery technology, revealed the successful finalization of the Technology-Optimization Report concerning its Ammonia Recovery System (ARS) located in Fair Oaks, IN.
news.headline: Bion completes report on Ammonia Recovery System at Fair Oaks, IN, showcasing success.

news.summary: SailPoint, Inc. (NASDAQ: SAIL) exceeded Q1 expectations with a 23% YoY revenue increase to $230.47 million. Their quarterly subscription revenue also rose by 27% to $215.32 million. The adjusted EPS was 1 cent, beating the estimated 1-cent loss. For Q2 FY26, SailPoint anticipates an ARR of $963-$967 million, marking a 26% growth, and expects revenue to reach $242-$244 million, a 22%-23% growth compared to the estimated $231.96 million. The company forecasts an adjusted EPS of 4 to 5. This guidance increase led them to raise their FY26 forecast above estimates.
news.headline: SailPoint beat Q1 earnings, with revenue at $230.47M (up 23%) and subscription revenue at $215.32M (up 27%). Q2 ARR predicted at $963M-$967M and revenue at $242M-$244M, aiming for 22%-23% growth. Adjusted EPS at 1 cent, exceeding predictions.

news.summary: The latest report on producer prices showed a rebound in May following a decline in April, but did not raise concerns about inflation. The Producer Price Index (PPI) increased by 2.6% year-over-year, slightly higher than the revised 2.5% in April. On a monthly basis, the PPI rose by 0.1%, reversing the 0.2% decline in April. Core PPI, which excludes food and energy prices and indicates underlying inflation trends, slowed to 3% annually from 3.2% in April, the lowest level since August 2024. Monthly core PPI increased by 0.1%, bouncing back from a 0.2% decline in the previous month. These figures suggest that tariffs and supply issues have not had a widespread impact on the economy. The data was released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.
news.headline: Producer prices rose 2.6% YoY in May, less than expected. Jobless claims signal cracks in labor market.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Boralex Inc. introduced Robin Deveaux as the new Executive Vice President and General Manager for North America. Deveaux will be taking over from Hugues Girardin, who is set to retire on December 31, 2025. Until his retirement, Girardin will be serving as a Transition Advisor to senior management to facilitate a seamless transition of duties. Boralex Inc. is listed as (TSX: BLX).
news.headline: Boralex appoints Robin Deveaux as EVP, General Manager for North America, succeeding Hugues Girardin retiring on Dec. 31.

news.summary: Singapore-based Trident Digital Tech Holdings Ltd, a key player in digital transformation and Web 3.0 activation, recently disclosed plans to generate $500 million for creating one of the globe's initial widespread corporate XRP Treasuries. To oversee this endeavor, the company has enlisted Chaince Securities LLC as its strategic advisor. This initiative signifies a groundbreaking step for Trident in incorporating decentralized financial assets into treasury and capital management strategies, presenting a notable advancement in blockchain-native financial infrastructure.
news.headline: Trident plans $500M financing for XRP Treasury, names Chaince Securities LLC strategic advisor in Singapore.

news.summary: Prescient AI is revolutionizing Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) to cater to contemporary marketers, with the addition of Danilo to drive sector-wide innovation. Set in Miami on June 12, 2025, Prescient AI is at the forefront of the industry as the top cutting-edge MMM platform for assessing, predicting, and enhancing.
news.headline: Danilo Tauro joins Prescient AI board to accelerate transformation in marketing mix modeling, supporting strategic growth.

news.summary: Boeing acknowledged being informed about the crash of the Air India flight and expressed commitment towards obtaining further details related to the incident.
news.headline: Boeing's 787 Dreamliner has raised safety concerns but never crashed. Boeing is investigating the crash on Air India flight.

news.summary: OptiGroup, a company based in GÖTEBORG, Sweden, shared the news on June 12, 2025, about its recent acquisition of CreaPak Oy, a Finnish packaging distributor. The acquired company specializes in providing packaging solutions for the food and building sectors. This acquisition will incorporate CreaPak into OptiGroup's packaging business in Finland. The deal marks a significant move for OptiGroup as it looks to expand its presence in the Finnish market.
news.headline: OptiGroup acquires CreaPak Oy, a Finnish packaging distributor, expanding their business in Finland.

news.summary: Securing safeguarding until 2039, guaranteeing extended exclusive rights in the market. On June 12, 2025, Hoth Therapeutics, Inc. unveiled that they have successfully acquired Japan Country Patent No. X, ensuring prolonged commercial exclusivity. Hoth Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOTH), renowned for their pioneering treatments as a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, has made this significant stride in protecting their innovations.
news.headline: Hoth Therapeutics obtains Japanese patent for HT-KIT platform targeting mast cell diseases, lasting until 2039.

news.summary: Louisville-based company, Humana, is honoring 10 exceptional athletes from the National Senior Games for their remarkable achievements in challenging the stereotypes associated with aging. The athletes are redefining the concept of aging and serving as inspiration to others.
news.headline: Humana honors 10 inspiring Senior Games athletes redefining aging; highlight positive impact.

news.summary: The film industry in Hunterdon County, New Jersey is experiencing a surge in activity. The recent releases of "Echo Valley" and "Happy Gilmore 2" on Apple TV+ and Netflix have brought attention to the area's growing popularity as a filming location. This development showcases the county's potential to attract more film productions in the future.
news.headline: Film industry in Hunterdon County, NJ gains momentum as Echo Valley & Happy Gilmore 2 debut on Apple TV+ & Netflix, showcasing its popularity.

news.summary: Chainlink, Kinexys from JPMorgan, and Ondo Finance successfully conducted a cross-chain Delivery versus Payment (DvP) settlement involving a permissioned payment network and a public Real World Asset (RWA) blockchain.
news.headline: Chainlink, JPMorgan, and Ondo Finance conduct crosschain treasury settlement involving permissioned payment network and public RWA blockchain.

news.summary: Yamaha has achieved a milestone with its sale of SX Series Pianos, the largest institutional acquisition in the company's history. The record-breaking transaction was made in partnership with the Peabody Institute at Johns Hopkins University, which is recognized as the oldest conservatory in the United States. This significant deal, which took place on June 12, 2025 in Buena Park, California, signifies a major collaboration between Yamaha and the esteemed music institution.
news.headline: Yamaha partners with Peabody to enhance music education. Record-breaking sale of SX Series Pianos - largest institutional acquisition.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Hyper Solutions, a manufacturer of critical digital infrastructure in the U.S., became a member of the National Electrical Manufacturers Association (NEMA). This move has significant implications for the company's future direction and operations.
news.headline: Hyper Solutions joined NEMA, a step that defines its role in electrical manufacturing future.

news.summary: Dr. Benjamin Stong, a prominent surgeon at Kalos Facial Plastic Surgery in Atlanta, has recently announced that his practice will be allowing patients to pay for both surgical and non-surgical cosmetic procedures using Bitcoin (BTC). This move establishes his practice as one of the pioneering medical facilities in the country to accept this form of cryptocurrency. Dr. Stong, known for his support of Bitcoin, views this decision as a crucial step forward in embracing innovative payment methods within the medical industry.
news.headline: Dr. Stong accepts Bitcoin for cosmetic procedures at Kalos Facial Plastic Surgery, a first in the U.S. for such services.

news.summary: Michaels, known for being the go-to spot for creativity, has surprised fans by releasing its highly anticipated Halloween decor earlier than usual. The collection features a diverse range of styles, from the edgy #Punkoween to the elegant Mad Hatter haute. The unveiling took place in Irving, Texas, on June 12, 2025. This early drop of spooky decorations has delighted customers and showcases the retailer's commitment to offering unique and exciting products for the upcoming holiday season.
news.headline: Michaels launches Summerween this Friday the 13th with new Halloween décor collections. #CodeOrange trend sets in.

news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, on June 12, 2025, American Freight Furniture & Mattress® has established itself as a top provider of brand name furniture at competitive prices. A recent collaboration with Mulberry, a product protection platform, aims to provide affordable options to customers.
news.headline: American Freight Furniture & Mattress teams up with Mulberry for new protection program, providing affordable options.

news.summary: A new exhibition by ceramic sculptor Sasha Feldman is scheduled to take place at the Ki Smith Gallery in New York City from May 31 to July 6, 2025. The opening reception is on May 31 at 6:00 pm. The collection will feature characters inspired by folklore and mythology. The address for the gallery is 170 Forsyth St., New York, NY 10002. The debut has garnered attention in New York with the exhibition running for a substantial period, attracting art enthusiasts and supporters.
news.headline: New York's Ki Smith Gallery hosts Sasha Feldman's TERRORCOTTA exhibit featuring ceramic characters, May 31 - July 6, 2025. Opening reception May 31 at 6:00 pm.

news.summary: In Winnemucca, Nevada on June 12, 2025, Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: HYMC) shared news of pricing for an underwritten offering. They revealed the sale of 12,500,000 units of the Company at a public price of $3.50 per Unit. This offering signifies a significant investment opportunity for interested parties. The Company appears optimistic about the response to this development.
news.headline: Hycroft Mining Holding Corp. upsizes public offering to 12.5M units at $3.50 each, raising $43.75M.

news.summary: Today, PulsePoint, a leading technology company in health decision-making, unveiled a strategic partnership with HUMAN Security. This collaboration brings forth a cutting-edge ad fraud defense solution that provides comprehensive protection against fraudulent activities in the digital advertising realm. By combining pre-bid mitigation and post-bid detection mechanisms, the solution ensures maximum security for advertisers. The integration of HUMAN Security's advanced defense technology with PulsePoint's robust platform marks a significant step forward in combating ad fraud. This collaboration is poised to make a substantial impact, helping to safeguard digital advertising budgets and promoting transparency in the industry.
news.headline: PulsePoint partners with HUMAN Security for ad fraud protection, offering pre-bid mitigation and post-bid detection. June 12, 2025.

news.summary: Recognizing excellence, innovation, and impact in various industries, the 2025 Globee® Awards winners were recently revealed in San Francisco on June 12th. Well-deserving winners were acknowledged for their noteworthy contributions, showcasing the best practices and highest standards in their respective fields. This year's edition of the Globee® Awards saw a record number of applicants, with a total of [insert specific number] entries received.

news.summary: Planning the ultimate road trip along California's Central Coast just got simpler with the unveiling of 'HOW 2 HWY 1' on June 12, 2025, in Monterey. This initiative offers new tips, tricks, and routes to inspire travel along the state's famous Highway 1. The project aims to facilitate exploration of California's picturesque coastline, providing essential information for road trippers. With this resource, travelers can now easily navigate the unique attractions and stunning views that the Central Coast has to offer.
news.headline: Explore Big Sur and beyond on a Monterey County road trip via 'HOW 2 HWY 1' launch for easier planning; new tips and routes.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 12, 2025, New Found Gold Corp. (TSXV: NFG) (NYSE-A: NFGC) has successfully completed the second and final tranche of its "bought deal" public offering. The company closed the offering with a total of 24,610,000 charity shares issued. This marks a significant milestone for New Found Gold as it continues to strengthen its market presence and pursue growth opportunities.
news.headline: New Found Gold completes C$63 million financing, 24,610,000 charity flow-through shares sold; all underwriters' option exercised.

news.summary: In Sheridan, Wyoming, on June 12, 2025, Inter/Arch Jobs, a top job platform for the built environment, declared a significant achievement. With more than 50,000 active job postings, the platform offers opportunities in architecture, interior design, construction, engineering, landscape, and related fields globally.
news.headline: Inter/Arch Jobs now has over 50,000 job listings in architecture, interior design, construction, engineering, landscape.

news.summary: In Natchitoches, Louisiana, as of June 12, 2025, drones are becoming increasingly advanced, secure, and easy to operate across various applications. These unmanned aerial vehicles are being utilized for tasks such as land surveys, crime scene investigation, precision agriculture, forestry management, land conservation, coastal evaluation, historic conservation, marketing, and numerous other purposes. These drones are enhancing efficiency and effectiveness in industries such as agriculture, law enforcement, environmental management, and tourism, among others.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025 in Beijing, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi revealed China's proposal to enhance communication between civilizations by upholding fairness, encouraging interactions, and fostering development. This initiative aims to strengthen global understanding and cooperation. Wang, a political figure in China, emphasized the importance of promoting mutual respect and inclusivity in dialogue among diverse cultures.
news.headline: China promotes dialogue among civilizations at new intl day; emphasizes equity, exchanges, progress - Wang Yi.

news.summary: KYOCERA AVX introduces ultra-compact and high-performance on-board, multiprotocol 2.4GHz antennas designed to assist customers in meeting demanding miniaturization, performance, and cost optimization requirements in mass market applications utilizing SiP modules. This offering is based in FOUNTAIN INN, S.C. and was announced in June.
news.headline: KYOCERA AVX provides compact 2.4GHz chip antennas for SiP modules, aiding miniaturization in mass market apps.

news.summary: The Ohio Legislature is focusing on addressing abuse within the Medicaid system, particularly the issue of individuals dubbed as #MedicaidMillionaires. This scandal has led to an annual savings of $1.2 billion by removing millionaires from Medicaid, contributing to a total of $200 billion in federal savings through the new bill. The Patient First Coalition (PFC) introduced this initiative in Columbus, Ohio on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Ohio targets #MedicaidMillionaires to save $1.2B annually, removing them from Medicaid program. #MedicaidFraud crackdown applauded.

news.summary: A recent survey conducted by KeyBank revealed that 50% of middle market companies view tariffs as a beneficial factor for competition. The survey, known as the Middle Market Sentiment Pulse Survey, was conducted in May 2025 and aimed to assess the current status of the middle market segment. This suggests that a significant portion of these companies perceive tariffs as a competitive advantage. The survey conducted by KeyBank, a prominent financial institution listed on NYSE as KEY, provides valuable insights into the perceptions and strategies of middle market companies.
news.headline: 91% of companies prioritize tariff impact management; 50% view tariffs as competitive advantage. KeyBank survey.

news.summary: A recent study revealed that 82% of American marketers believe that top-notch creative content plays a crucial role in achieving Key Performance Indicator (KPI) goals. Despite this consensus, the industry continues to prioritize targeting and data strategies. The report, titled "The Creative Edge in Retail Media: A...", was published by TripleLift, a prominent Creative SSP. This research signifies the growing recognition among marketers of the significance of high-quality creative content in driving successful outcomes.
news.headline: Retail media success hinges on creative excellence, per TripleLift research. 82% of US marketers believe quality creative is crucial for KPI outcomes in the $179.5B market.

news.summary: A team from Universal Technical Institute (UTI) recently competed against 48 schools and secured several top 10 finishes. This achievement was announced in Phoenix on June 12, 2025, by UTI, which is known for providing education in transportation, skilled trades, electrical work, and energy. The exact number of top 10 finishes and the specific competition were not mentioned.
news.headline: UTI-Houston Aviation students win 1st place in 2025 Aerospace Maintenance Competition against 48 schools with top 10 finishes.
